title: MEDICAL SERVICES AND NEEDLE EXCHANGE - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS SERVICE CENTER MEDICAL SERVICES AND NEEDLE EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mobile medical care and needle exchange by hosting Central City Concern's and Outside In's medical vans and syringe exchange program. Includes a full range of health services such as disease management, routine primary care, HIV/STI testing, women's health care, mental health, and transgender care. Also provides assistance with enrollment in Oregon Health Plan (OHP) or other health insurance plans. For the syringe exchange, users get an even exchange for however many syringes they bring in, though no one will be turned away for not having returns. 8800 SE 80th Avenue Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: -Medical van: Age 13 and older. Low-income individuals and households. Must not be receiving primary care from another provider. -Needle exchange: Ages 18 and older Hours: Medical van: Tuesday 9am-3pm Needle exchange: Tuesday/Thursday 1pm-4pm Email (503) 771-7914 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 771-7914 OHP Enrollment Assistance (503) 583-6659 Outside In Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. First come, first served. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: 82nd and Cornwell are the nearest cross streets. Located near the intersection of 82nd and Johnson Creek Boulevard. Turn left on Cornwell, just past the Fred Meyer parking lot and O'Reilly Auto Parts. Served by TriMet Bus Line 72 (82nd Avenue). Services: Mobile Health Care Navigator Programs Needle Exchange and Injection Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY AND MEALS MATERIAL GOODS - PERSONAL GOODS AND DIAPERS MATERIAL GOODS - SHOWERS AND LAUNDRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS SERVICE CENTER
